prompt:
Create a premium fine-art surreal portrait inspired by geometric modernism and luxury editorial illustration. The composition is perfectly split vertically down the center.
On the left side: a highly detailed realistic portrait of a beautiful young woman wearing an elegant deep crimson-red wide-brim hat and a flowing red scarf wrapped around her shoulders. Soft flawless skin, expressive eyes, cinematic beauty photography, ultra-realistic facial details, delicate makeup, rich textures, dramatic lighting.
On the right side: seamlessly merge the woman's face with the face of a majestic king penguin, perfectly aligned eye-to-eye and beak-to-face. The transition must be clean, symmetrical, artistic, and visually striking, creating a human-animal hybrid portrait.
Background consists of bold geometric Bauhaus-inspired shapes and abstract art elements using red, black, cream, ivory, and golden-yellow tones. Include circles, rectangles, vertical stripes, balanced symmetry, and modern graphic design aesthetics.
Luxury gallery artwork, museum-quality composition, sophisticated color harmony, ultra-detailed brush textures, digital oil painting style, elegant contrast, contemporary surrealism, geometric abstraction, fine-art poster design, centered composition, sharp focus, masterpiece, award-winning artwork, 8K resolution.
Negative Prompt:
signature, watermark, artist name, logo, text, caption, handwriting, frame, border, extra eyes, extra face, asymmetrical face, blurry details, low quality, distorted anatomy, duplicate features, cropped head, messy background, oversaturated colors, noisy image, deformed penguin, cartoon style, low resolution.
